name: Spicy Mussels in White Wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a heavy large pot over medium-high heat.
2. Add onion, garlic, fennel seeds, crushed red pepper, and salt. Sauté until the onion is light brown, about 4 minutes.
3. Stir in white wine, lemon slices, and 1/4 cup parsley. Bring to a boil.
4. Add mussels to the pot. Cover and cook until all mussel shells open, stirring once to rearrange the mussels, about 6 minutes. Discard any mussels that do not open.
5. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the cooked mussels to a large shallow bowl.
6. Reduce the broth in the pot over medium heat until it is reduced to 1 cup, about 3 minutes. Season with pepper to taste.
7. Pour the reduced broth over the mussels.
8. Sprinkle chopped seeded tomatoes and remaining parsley over the dish.
9. Serve garlic toast alongside to mop up the savory broth.
